info.title: Remnawave API v2.8.1
info.description:
Remnawave is a powerful proxy managment tool, built on top of Xray-core, with a focus on simplicity and ease of use.

## Resources
* https://t.me/remnawave
* https://github.com/remnawave
* https://docs.rw

tags.name: API Tokens Controller
tags.description: Manage API tokens to use in your code. This controller can't be used with API token, only with Admin JWT token

tags.name: Users Controller
tags.description: Manage users, change their status, reset traffic, etc.

tags.name: [Public] Subscription Controller
tags.description: Public Subscription Controller. Methods of this controller are not protected with auth. Use it only for public requests.

tags.name: [Protected] Subscriptions Controller
tags.description: Methods of this controller are protected with auth, most of them is returning the same informations as public Subscription Controller.

tags.name: IP Management Controller
tags.description: Management of IP addresses and connections.

tags.name: Keygen Controller
tags.description: Generation of SECRET_KEY for Remnawave Node.

tags.name: Metadata Controller
tags.description: Manage arbitrary metadata for Users and Nodes.

username.description: Unique username for the user. Required. Must be 3-36 characters long and contain only letters, numbers, underscores and dashes.

status.description: Optional. User account status. Defaults to ACTIVE.

shortUuid.description: Optional. Short UUID identifier for the user.

trojanPassword.description: Optional. Password for Trojan protocol. Must be 8-32 characters.

vlessUuid.description: Optional. UUID for VLESS protocol. Must be a valid UUID format.

ssPassword.description: Optional. Password for Shadowsocks protocol. Must be 8-32 characters.

trafficLimitBytes.description: Optional. Traffic limit in bytes. Set to 0 for unlimited traffic.

lastTrafficResetAt.description: Optional. Date of last traffic reset. Format: 2025-01-17T15:38:45.065Z

description.description: Optional. Additional notes or description for the user account.

tag.description: Optional. User tag for categorization. Max 16 characters, uppercase letters, numbers and underscores only.

telegramId.description: Optional. Telegram user ID for notifications. Must be an integer.

email.description: Optional. User email address. Must be a valid email format.

hwidDeviceLimit.description: Optional. Maximum number of hardware devices allowed. Must be a positive integer.

activeInternalSquads.description: Optional. Array of UUIDs representing enabled internal squads.

uuid.description: Optional. Pass UUID to create user with specific UUID, otherwise it will be generated automatically.
UUID of the user. UUID has higher priority than username, so if both are provided, username will be ignored.

revokeOnlyPasswords.description: Optional. If true, only passwords will be revoked, without changing the short UUID (Subscription URL).

shortUuid.description: Optional. If not provided, a new short UUID will be generated by Remnawave. Please note that it is strongly recommended to allow Remnawave to generate the short UUID.

excludedInternalSquads.description: Optional. Internal squads from which the host will be excluded.

excludeFromSubscriptionTypes.description: Optional. Subscription types from which the host will be excluded from.

excludedInternalSquads.description: Optional. Internal squads from which the host will be excluded.

excludeFromSubscriptionTypes.description: Optional. Subscription types from which the host will be excluded from.

excludedInternalSquads.description: Optional. Internal squads from which the host will be excluded.

excludeFromSubscriptionTypes.description: Optional. Subscription types from which the host will be excluded from.

x-enum-descriptions.H3_H2_H1_COMBINED: Combined HTTP/3, HTTP/2, and HTTP/1.1 ALPN.

TemplateType.description: Type of template configuration for `Xray-Core`, `mihomo`, etc.

ConditionsOperator.description: Operator to use for comparing the `headerName` with `value`.

x-enum-descriptions.EQUALS: Performs an exact comparison between the header value and specified string. `string === value`.
x-enum-descriptions.NOT_EQUALS: Ensures the header value does not exactly match the specified string. `string !== value`.
x-enum-descriptions.CONTAINS: Checks if the header value contains the specified string as a substring. `string.includes()`.
x-enum-descriptions.NOT_CONTAINS: Verifies the header value does not contain the specified string as a substring. `!string.includes()`.
x-enum-descriptions.STARTS_WITH: Validates that the header value begins with the specified string. `string.startsWith()`.
x-enum-descriptions.NOT_STARTS_WITH: Validates that the header value does not begin with the specified string. `!string.startsWith()`.
x-enum-descriptions.ENDS_WITH: Confirms the header value ends with the specified string. `string.endsWith()`.
x-enum-descriptions.NOT_ENDS_WITH: Confirms the header value does not end with the specified string. `!string.endsWith()`.
x-enum-descriptions.REGEX: Evaluates if the header value matches the specified regular expression pattern. `regex.test()`.
x-enum-descriptions.NOT_REGEX: Evaluates if the header value does not match the specified regular expression pattern. `!regex.test()`.

Fingerprint.description: Simulate the TLS fingerprint using the `uTLS` library or it generate randomly.

x-enum-descriptions.CHROME: Simulate TLS fingerprint of the `Chrome` browser.
x-enum-descriptions.FIREFOX: Simulate TLS fingerprint of the `Firefox` browser.
x-enum-descriptions.SAFARI: Simulate TLS fingerprint of the `Safari` browser.
x-enum-descriptions.IOS: Simulate TLS fingerprint of the `iOS` browser.
x-enum-descriptions.ANDROID: Simulate TLS fingerprint of the `Android` browser.
x-enum-descriptions.EDGE: Simulate TLS fingerprint of the `Edge` browser.
x-enum-descriptions.QQ: Simulate TLS fingerprint of the `QQ` browser.
x-enum-descriptions.RANDOM: Rrandomly select one of the `up-to-date` browsers.
x-enum-descriptions.RANDOMIZED: Generate a completely random and unique fingerprint (100% compatible with `TLS 1.3` using `X25519`).

RulesOperator.description: Operator to use for combining conditions in the rule.

x-enum-descriptions.AND: All conditions in the rule must match.
x-enum-descriptions.OR: Any condition in the rule may match.

ResponseType.description: Type of the response. Determines the type of `response` to be returned when the rule is matched.

x-enum-descriptions.XRAY_JSON: Return `subscription` in XRAY-JSON format. (Using `Xray Json` template).
x-enum-descriptions.XRAY_BASE64: Return `subscription` in BASE64 encoded string. Compatible with most client application with Xray core.
x-enum-descriptions.CLASH: Return `subscription` in Clash format. (Using `Clash` template) Useful for client application that use Legacy Clash core.
x-enum-descriptions.SINGBOX: Return `subscription` in Singbox format. (Using `Singbox` template) Format which is used by Singbox client application.
x-enum-descriptions.BROWSER: Return `subscription` as browser format. The same as on `/info` route.

x-enum-descriptions.DEFAULT: Use the default transport layer encryption behavior.

x-enum-descriptions.MONTH_ROLLING: Traffic limit resets monthly by creation date.

x-enum-descriptions.RESET_TRAFFIC: Reset traffic counters for selected nodes.

x-enum-descriptions.INFRA_BILLING_NODE_PAYMENT_IN_7_DAYS: Node payment is due in 7 days.
x-enum-descriptions.INFRA_BILLING_NODE_PAYMENT_IN_48HRS: Node payment is due in 48 hours.
x-enum-descriptions.INFRA_BILLING_NODE_PAYMENT_IN_24HRS: Node payment is due in 24 hours.
x-enum-descriptions.INFRA_BILLING_NODE_PAYMENT_OVERDUE_24HRS: Node payment is overdue by 24 hours.
x-enum-descriptions.INFRA_BILLING_NODE_PAYMENT_OVERDUE_48HRS: Node payment is overdue by 48 hours.
x-enum-descriptions.INFRA_BILLING_NODE_PAYMENT_OVERDUE_7_DAY: Node payment is overdue by 7 days.

x-enum-descriptions.FIRST_CONNECTED: User connected for the first time.
x-enum-descriptions.BANDWIDTH_USAGE_THRESHOLD_REACHED: User reached the bandwidth usage threshold.

x-enum-descriptions.BANDWIDTH_USAGE_THRESHOLD_REACHED_MAX_NO: Maximum bandwidth usage threshold notifications reached.

ResponseRuleModificationsHeadersDto.description: {"markdownDescription":"**Key** and **value** of the response header will be added to the response."}

key.description: {"markdownDescription":"Key of the response header. Must comply with RFC 7230."}

ResponseRuleEncryptionDto.description: {"markdownDescription":"Encrypt response body with given parameters. Generate keypairs with Rescue CLI: `docker exec -it remnawave cli`, select \"Generate keypairs\"."}

ResponseRuleConditionDto.description: {"markdownDescription":"Condition to check against the **headerName**.","defaultSnippets":[{"label":"Examples: Check if header contains \"text/html\"","markdownDescription":"Condition to check if **headerName** contains \"text/html\"","body":{"headerName":"accept","operator":"CONTAINS","value":"text/html","caseSensitive":true}}]}

headerName.description: {"markdownDescription":"**Name** of the HTTP header to check. Must comply with RFC 7230."}

operator.description: {"errorMessage":"Invalid operator. Please select a valid operator.","markdownDescription":"Operator to use for comparing the `headerName` with `value`.","markdownEnumDescriptions":["Performs an exact, comparison between the header value and specified string. `string === value`","Ensures the header value does not exactly match the specified string. `string !== value`","Checks if the header value contains the specified string as a substring. `string.includes()`","Verifies the header value does not contain the specified string as a substring. `!string.includes()`","Validates that the header value begins with the specified string. `string.startsWith()`","Validates that the header value does not begin with the specified string. `!string.startsWith()`","Confirms the header value ends with the specified string. `string.endsWith()`","Confirms the header value does not end with the specified string. `!string.endsWith()`","Evaluates if the header value matches the specified regular expression pattern. `regex.test()`","Evaluates if the header value does not match the specified regular expression pattern. `!regex.test()`"]}

ResponseRuleModificationsDto.description: {"examples":[{"headers":[{"key":"X-Custom-Header","value":"CustomValue"}]}],"markdownDescription":"Response modifications to be applied when the rule is matched. Optional."}

headers.description: {"defaultSnippets":[{"label":"Examples: Add custom header","markdownDescription":"Add a custom header to the response","body":[{"key":"X-Custom-Header","value":"CustomValue"}]}],"markdownDescription":"Array of headers to be added when the rule is matched."}

applyHeadersToEnd.description: {"markdownDescription":"By default, headers are added when forming the response. In some cases, headers set in SRR may be overridden by headers from other parts of the system. If you set this flag to **true**, headers from SRR will be added at the very end, just before the response is sent. In this case, SRR headers may override headers from other sections."}

subscriptionTemplate.description: {"markdownDescription":"Override the subscription template with the given name. If not provided, the default subscription template will be used. If the template name is not found, the default subscription template for this type will be used. **This modification have higher priority than settings from External Squads.**"}

ignoreHostXrayJsonTemplate.description: {"markdownDescription":"Each Host may have its own Xray Json Template. If you set this flag to **true**, the Xray Json Template defined by the SRR will be used. **The Host's Xray Json Template will be ignored.**"}

ignoreServeJsonAtBaseSubscription.description: {"markdownDescription":"If you set this flag to **true**, the **Serve JSON at Base Subscription** setting will be ignored (set to **false**)."}

additionalExtendedClientsRegex.description:
{"markdownDescription":"Additional regex patterns to match extended clients. Matched clients will receive `serverDescription` in the subscription response.

**Default Mihomo extended clients:**
- `^FlClash ?X/`
- `^Flowvy/`
- `^prizrak-box/`
- `^koala-clash/`

**Default Xray extended clients:**
- `^Happ/`
- `^INCY/`

**Example:** `["^MyClient/", "^CustomApp\\/v2"]`"}

disableHwidCheck.description: {"markdownDescription":"If you set this flag to **true**, the HWID check will be disabled. **This modification have higher priority than settings from Subscription Settings.**"}

excludeHostsByTags.description: {"markdownDescription":"Excludes hosts from the subscription output if at least one tag in the host matches the given tags."}

ResponseRuleDto.description:
{"defaultSnippets":[{"label":"Examples: Blank rule","markdownDescription":"Simple blank rule with no conditions or modifications.
```json
{
  "name": "Blank rule",
  "description": "Blank rule",
  "operator": "AND",
  "enabled": true,
  "conditions": [],
  "responseType": "BLOCK",
  "responseModifications": {
    "headers": []
  }
}
```","body":{"name":"Blank rule","description":"Blank rule","operator":"AND","enabled":true,"conditions":[],"responseType":"BLOCK","responseModifications":{"headers":[]}}},{"label":"Examples: Block Legacy Clients","markdownDescription":"Block requests from legacy clients
```json
{
  "name": "Block Legacy Clients",
  "description": "Block requests from legacy clients",
  "enabled": true,
  "operator": "OR",
  "conditions": [
    {
      "headerName": "user-agent",
      "operator": "CONTAINS",
      "value": "Hiddify",
      "caseSensitive": true
    },
    {
      "headerName": "user-agent",
      "operator": "CONTAINS",
      "value": "FoxRay",
      "caseSensitive": true
    }
  ],
  "responseType": "BLOCK"
}
```","body":{"name":"Block Legacy Clients","description":"Block requests from legacy clients","enabled":true,"operator":"OR","conditions":[{"headerName":"user-agent","operator":"CONTAINS","value":"Hiddify","caseSensitive":true},{"headerName":"user-agent","operator":"CONTAINS","value":"FoxRay","caseSensitive":true}],"responseType":"BLOCK"}}],"title":"Response Rule","markdownDescription":"Response rule configuration.

**Fields:**
- **name**: Name of the response rule.
- **description**: Description of the response rule. Optional.
- **enabled**: Control whether the response rule is enabled or disabled. 

 - `true` the rule will be applied. 

 - `false` the rule will be always ignored.
- **operator**: Operator to use for combining conditions in the rule.
- **conditions**: Array of conditions to check against the request headers. Conditions are applied with **operator**. If conditions are empty, the rule will be matched.
- **responseType**: Type of the response. Determines the type of **response** to be returned when the rule is matched.
- **responseModifications**: Response modifications to be applied when the rule is matched. Optional.

**Example:**
```json
{
  "name": "Block Legacy Clients",
  "description": "Block requests from legacy clients",
  "enabled": true,
  "operator": "OR",
  "conditions": [
    {
      "headerName": "user-agent",
      "operator": "CONTAINS",
      "value": "Hiddify",
      "caseSensitive": true
    },
    {
      "headerName": "user-agent",
      "operator": "CONTAINS",
      "value": "FoxRay",
      "caseSensitive": true
    }
  ],
  "responseType": "BLOCK"
}
```"}

conditions.description: {"markdownDescription":"Array of conditions to check against the request headers. Conditions are applied with **operator**. If conditions are empty, the rule will be matched."}

disableSubscriptionAccessByPath.description: {"markdownDescription":"Usually, a user's subscription may also be available via additional paths such as **/json**, **/stash**, or **/mihomo**. If this flag is set to **true**, access via these additional paths will be disabled."}

- **enabled**: Control whether the response rule is enabled or disabled. 

 - `true` the rule will be applied. 

 - `false` the rule will be always ignored.
- **operator**: Operator to use for combining conditions in the rule.
- **conditions**: Array of conditions to check against the request headers. Conditions are applied with **operator**. If conditions are empty, the rule will be matched.
- **responseType**: Type of the response. Determines the type of **response** to be returned when the rule is matched.
- **responseModifications**: Response modifications to be applied when the rule is matched. Optional.

**Example:**
```json
{
  "name": "Block Legacy Clients",
  "description": "Block requests from legacy clients",
  "enabled": true,
  "operator": "OR",
  "conditions": [
    {
      "headerName": "user-agent",
      "operator": "CONTAINS",
      "value": "Hiddify",
      "caseSensitive": true
    },
    {
      "headerName": "user-agent",
      "operator": "CONTAINS",
      "value": "FoxRay",
      "caseSensitive": true
    }
  ],
  "responseType": "BLOCK"
}
```"}

operator.description: {"markdownDescription":"Operator to use for combining conditions in the rule."}

conditions.description: {"markdownDescription":"Array of conditions to check against the request headers. Conditions are applied with **operator**. If conditions are empty, the rule will be matched."}

responseType.description: {"errorMessage":"Invalid response type. Please select a valid response type.","markdownDescription":"Type of the response. Determines the type of **response** to be returned when the rule is matched.","markdownEnumDescriptions":["Return **subscription** in XRAY-JSON format. (Using `Xray Json` template)","Return **subscription** in BASE64 encoded string. Compatible with most client application with Xray core.","Return **subscription** in Mihomo format. (Using `Mihomo` template)","Return **subscription** in Stash format. (Using `Stash` template)","Return **subscription** in Clash format. (Using `Clash` template) Useful for client application that use Legacy Clash core.","Return **subscription** in Singbox format. (Using `Singbox` template) Format which is used by Singbox client application.","Return **subscription** as browser format. The same as on `/info` route.","**Drop** request and return `403` status code.","**Drop** request and return `404` status code.","**Drop** request and return `451` status code.","**Drop** the socket connection."]}

disableSubscriptionAccessByPath.description: {"markdownDescription":"Usually, a user's subscription may also be available via additional paths such as **/json**, **/stash**, or **/mihomo**. If this flag is set to **true**, access via these additional paths will be disabled."}

version.description: {"title":"Response Rules Config Version","markdownDescription":"Version of the **response rules** config. Currently supported version is **1**."}

nextCursor.description: Cursor to fetch the next page, or null if there are no more results

hasMore.description: Whether there are more results to fetch
